title: OPPlus
description: This project adds a Minecraft command quick-access GUI!
body:
# OPPlus

Join the Runeshard Discord today: https://discord.gg/NSYFkbbjjZ - Would appricate every single new member!

OPPlus is a Mod created by Runeshard Studios which will provide you following:

- Suggested GUI Scale: 2 (fullscreen)
- A simple command/key to open a quick-access for the most used vanilla (green), server staff (blue) and worldedit (yellow) commands
- Easy clickable, searchable by name
- Three categories of commands: Vanilla, Server Staff, WorldEdit (coming next update) - To see all commands, scroll down in the GUI 
- Displays your top 10 most used commands and also saves them for other servers or gaming sessions ;)


<details>
<summary>How To Open The GUI</summary>

Use ```/opplus``` in order to open the menu!
Or use the letter ```O``` on your keyboard to open it even faster!
</details>

<details>
<summary>Command List (EN)</summary>

**𝚃̲̲͟𝚑̲̲͟𝚎̲̲͟ ̲𝚖̲̲͟𝚎̲̲͟𝚗̲̲͟𝚞̲̲͟ ̲𝚌̲̲͟𝚘̲̲͟𝚗̲̲͟𝚜̲̲͟𝚒̲̲͟𝚜̲̲͟𝚝̲̲͟𝚜̲̲͟ ̲𝚘̲̲͟𝚏̲̲͟ ̲𝚏̲̲͟𝚘̲̲͟𝚕̲̲͟𝚕̲̲͟𝚘̲̲͟𝚠̲̲͟𝚒̲̲͟𝚗̲̲͟𝚐̲̲͟ ̲𝟷̲̲͟𝟺̲̲͟𝟹̲̲͟ ̲𝚌̲̲͟𝚘̲̲͟𝚖̲̲͟𝚖̲̲͟𝚊̲̲͟𝚗̲̲͟𝚍̲̲͟𝚜̲̲͟:̲̲͟**
